ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lookup_values" (
  "lookup_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lookup value */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data field */,
  "lookup_value" TEXT /* Human-friendly display name for the lookup value */,
  "standard_lookup_value" TEXT /* Standard lookup display name as per the data dictionary */,
  "legacy_odata_value" TEXT /* Legacy OData value provided by the server vendor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the lookup value */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the lookup value is the default */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lookup_value_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "field_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certifications" (
  "cert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification level */,
  "cert_level" TEXT /* Level of certification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the certification level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wiki_pages" (
  "wiki_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wiki page */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated data field */,
  "page_title" TEXT /* Title of the wiki page */,
  "page_url" TEXT /* URL of the wiki page */,
  "page_content" TEXT /* Content of the wiki page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wiki_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the affected data field */,
  "lookup_value_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the affected lookup value */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_log_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_log_lookup_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("lookup_value_id") REFERENCES lookup_values ("lookup_value_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "perm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lookup_synonyms" (
  "syn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each synonym */,
  "lookup_value_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lookup value */,
  "synonym" TEXT /* Synonym of the lookup value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("syn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lookup_synonyms_lookup_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("lookup_value_id") REFERENCES lookup_values ("lookup_value_id")
)
